name: Neo Credit Card
rewardType: edge reward points and merchant discounts
exclusions: transactions excluded under Neo Credit Card terms
additionalBenefits: Currently listed as nil joining and nil annual fee under limited period offer on Axis official catalogue
Standard product fee page lists Rs 250 joining fee and Rs 250 annual fee from second year onward, lifetime free for select channels
100% cashback up to Rs 300 on first utility bill payment within 30 days of card issuance
Flat Rs 120 off on Zomato food delivery twice per month on minimum order value of Rs 499
5% off on Paytm mobile recharge, broadband, DTH and utility payments, capped at Rs 150 per month
10% off on Blinkit, capped at Rs 250 per month on minimum spends of Rs 750
10% off on BookMyShow movie tickets, capped at Rs 100 per month
Rs 150 off on Myntra on selected styles with minimum spends of Rs 999
1 EDGE REWARD Point per Rs 200 on eligible spends
Dining Delights discounts at participating restaurants

salaried: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India or NRI
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India or NRI
